mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RSID_VHCL ( RSID_VHCL_NO, VHCL_NM, VHCL_NO, VHCL_STTS_CD, USER_NO, HO_NO, VHCL_FILE_NO ) VALUES ( #{rsidVhclNo}, #{vhclNm}, #{vhclNo}, #{vhclSttsCd}, #{userNo}, #{hoNo}, #{vhclFileNo} )
mapper.select:
SELECT RV.RSID_VHCL_NO AS rsidVhclNo, RV.VHCL_STTS_CD AS vhclSttsCd, RV.VHCL_NM AS vhclNm, RV.VHCL_NO AS vhclNo, M.USER_NM AS userNm, RV.USER_NO AS userNo, RV.HO_NO AS hoNo, CASE WHEN AD.HO IS NOT NULL THEN (CASE WHEN INSTR(AD.DONG_NO, '_') > 0 THEN SUBSTR(AD.DONG_NO, INSTR(AD.DONG_NO, '_') + 1) ELSE AD.DONG_NO END) || '동 ' || AD.HO || '호' ELSE RV.HO_NO END AS unitDisplay, RV.VHCL_FILE_NO AS vhclFileNo, RV.REG_DT AS regDt, RV.MDF_DT AS mdfDt
FROM RSID_VHCL RV LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON M.USER_NO = RV.USER_NO LEFT JOIN APT_DETAIL AD ON AD.HO_NO = RV.HO_NO
WHERE RV.HO_NO LIKE #{aptCmplexNo} || '%'
ORDER BY RV.REG_DT DESC

SELECT RV.RSID_VHCL_NO, RV.VHCL_STTS_CD, RV.VHCL_NM, RV.VHCL_NO, M.USER_NM AS USER_NM, RV.USER_NO, RV.HO_NO, CASE WHEN AD.HO IS NOT NULL THEN (CASE WHEN INSTR(AD.DONG_NO, '_') > 0 THEN SUBSTR(AD.DONG_NO, INSTR(AD.DONG_NO, '_') + 1) ELSE AD.DONG_NO END) || '동 ' || AD.HO || '호' ELSE RV.HO_NO END AS UNIT_DISPLAY, RV.VHCL_FILE_NO, RV.REG_DT, RV.MDF_DT FROM RSID_VHCL RV LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON M.USER_NO = RV.USER_NO LEFT JOIN APT_DETAIL AD ON AD.HO_NO = RV.HO_NO WHERE RV.RSID_VHCL_NO = #{rsidVhclNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE RSID_VHCL SET VHCL_NM = #{vhclNm}, VHCL_NO = #{vhclNo}, USER_NO = #{userNo}, HO_NO = #{hoNo}, MDF_DT = SYSDATE WHERE RSID_VHCL_NO = #{rsidVhclNo}
mapper.select: SELECT HH.USER_NO, HH.INOUT_CD, HH.HEAD_YN FROM HSHLD_HEAD HH INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON M.USER_NO = HH.USER_NO WHERE HH.HO_NO = #{hoNo} AND REPLACE(TRIM(M.USER_NM), ' ', '') = REPLACE(TRIM(#{residentName}), ' ', '')
